response.overview: It is the ultimate taste-maker island and whilst being known mainly as an importer of tunes, there is homegrown Ibiza-crafted music that flowers in the form of Chill Out. DJ Chris Coco mixes an aural journey reflecting the shifting moods of an Ibiza day. Travelling the island from sun up to sun down, the scenes are spectacular. The pivotal aspect of just about every DJ Chill Out set is sunset, which, played right, becomes an intensely emotional experience - a marriage of music, mood and precise moment. See this ceremony unfold on the magic that is Visions of Ibiza, Volume I.
response.title: Chris Coco: Visions of Ibiza
